metadata.gazette_notification: Acts Supplement No. 7 to the Uganda Gazette No. 35 Volume CXV, 22 June 2022
metadata.publisher: Uganda Printing and Publishing Corporation (UPPC), Entebbe
metadata.source_authority: Parliament of the Republic of Uganda
metadata.source_note: Appropriation Act, 2022 (Act 15 of 2022) from the Uganda Gazette Acts Supplement No. 7 of 22 June 2022 (archive.gazettes.africa scan of the gazette print). Sections 2-3: the Treasury may issue out of the Consolidated Fund and apply the appropriated sums for the services and purposes in the Schedule. Captured as the statutory expenditure-authorisation anchor for policy-class programme modules (Senior Citizens Grant); the FY2025/26 Appropriation Act, 2025 print is an open capture item.
metadata.title: Appropriation Act, 2022 (Act 15 of 2022) — issue and appropriation of public money for FY2022/23
